inputs.command:
git add .planning/REQUIREMENTS.xml .planning/ROADMAP.xml .planning/STATE.xml .planning/graph.json && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
planning: capture requirements + phase 01 standalone-ready roadmap

Snapshot of the shape repub-builder already delivers (CLI, reader,
planning-pack, watch mode) as REQUIREMENTS.xml, taken as the project
is externalized from custom_portfolio monorepo into its own repo.
Phase 01 "standalone-ready" scopes the CI + release-tag + consumer-
verify work that lets custom_portfolio retire the vendored copy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" 2>&1 | head

outputs:

warning: in the working copy of '.planning/graph.json', LF will be replaced by CRLF the next time Git touches it
